languages.text: "Перстень-печатка? Это не просто украшение, а знак власти. Такими не разбрасываются. Эта находка тревожит меня сильнее прочих".

traits.locale_text: "Перстень-печатка? Это не просто украшение, а знак власти. Такими не разбрасываются. Эта находка тревожит меня сильнее прочих".

languages.text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."
languages.original_text: "Перстень-печатка? Это не просто украшение, а знак власти. Такими не разбрасываются. Эта находка тревожит меня сильнее прочих".

traits.locale_text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."
"A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."
"A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."

languages.text: “一枚图章戒指？那可不是普通首饰，而是权力的象征，绝不可能被随手乱扔。这个发现简直太让人不安了。”
languages.original_text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."

traits.locale_text: “一枚图章戒指？那可不是普通首饰，而是权力的象征，绝不可能被随手乱扔。这个发现简直太让人不安了。”

languages.text: « Une chevalière ? Plus qu'un simple bijou, il s'agit là d'un symbole de pouvoir. Ce n'est pas quelque chose dont on se débarrasse pour un oui ou pour un non. Voilà bien la découverte la plus troublante de toutes. »
languages.original_text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."

traits.locale_text: « Une chevalière ? Plus qu'un simple bijou, il s'agit là d'un symbole de pouvoir. Ce n'est pas quelque chose dont on se débarrasse pour un oui ou pour un non. Voilà bien la découverte la plus troublante de toutes. »

languages.text: "Mühür yüzüğü mü? Bu yalnızca bir mücevher değil, aynı zamanda bir güç simgesi. Öylece kenara köşeye atılacak bir şey değil. Bunun ne kadar rahatsız edici bir bulgu olduğunu anlatamam."
languages.original_text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."

traits.locale_text: "Mühür yüzüğü mü? Bu yalnızca bir mücevher değil, aynı zamanda bir güç simgesi. Öylece kenara köşeye atılacak bir şey değil. Bunun ne kadar rahatsız edici bir bulgu olduğunu anlatamam."

languages.text: «¿Un anillo grabado? Eso no es una joya cualquiera, sino un símbolo de poder. No es algo que nadie abandonaría sin más. Este es el descubrimiento más inquietante de todos».
languages.original_text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."

traits.locale_text: «¿Un anillo grabado? Eso no es una joya cualquiera, sino un símbolo de poder. No es algo que nadie abandonaría sin más. Este es el descubrimiento más inquietante de todos».

languages.text: "Ein Siegelring? Das ist nicht nur ein Schmuckstück, sondern ein Machtsymbol. Etwas, das man nicht achtlos wegwirft. Das ist die beunruhigendste Entdeckung von allen."
languages.original_text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Siegelring? Das ist nicht nur ein Schmuckstück, sondern ein Machtsymbol. Etwas, das man nicht achtlos wegwirft. Das ist die beunruhigendste Entdeckung von allen."

languages.text: 「印鑑？それはただの装飾品ではなく、権力の象徴だ。軽々に捨てられるものではない。これが最も恐ろしい発見だ。」
languages.original_text: "A signet ring? That is not just a piece of jewellery, but a symbol of power. It is not something to be carelessly discarded. This is the most disturbing discovery of all."

traits.locale_text: 「印鑑？それはただの装飾品ではなく、権力の象徴だ。軽々に捨てられるものではない。これが最も恐ろしい発見だ。」
